title: Server crashes when executing a window query with ordering by EXTRACT date
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE departments (id Int32, name String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
CREATE TABLE employees (dep_id Int32, name String, salary Float64, hire_date Date) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY dep_id;
SELECT dep_id, name, salary, SUM(salary) OVER (ORDER BY toYear(hire_date)) AS salary_sum FROM employees;
key_bug_features: Executing window query with ordering by EXTRACT date
